series_metadata.series_description: These files contain all pertainent documentation to determine disciplainary actions taken against each employee, including violation, evidence and final decission.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy paper copy of any documentation relating to discipline after it is uploaded to the OH Grievance System Database. ; Electronic: Disciplinary files are permanently maintained by DAS in the OH Grievance System electronic database., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
